hard_constraints: 永久禁令：POST/PUT/DELETE、交易语义端点、listenKey/user data stream/websocket（含铺垫代码）
单一 HMAC 出口 = backend/services/private_client.py（grep 断言）
deny-by-default (method, exact-path) 白名单，签名构造前拦截
key/secret 任何片段不得进代码/日志/报告/fixture
进 git 的样本/报告/fixture 数值按 §2.A 脱敏标记表脱敏（运行时页面真实展示不受限）
classify.py / normalize.py 零改动；枚举与优先级零改动
E1/E1b 为 discovery-only，本轮快照装配不调用
开发中途新增端点 = R3 升级，禁止顺手加
实现终端不 commit、不碰 status.json；R10 收尾段必须机械执行
review-2 ACCEPT 只进 stage_accepted_waiting_user；merge 回 main 仅限用户明确验收后（bookkeeper 不得代翻 accepted）
本 stage 全部提交只落 stage/2026-07-private-account-v1 分支

review_2.fallback_reason: 本 stage 决策模型池中无 unrelated decision model 可用: claude_glm (Task A implementer) 与 kimi (Task B implementer) hard-ban (AGENTS.md implementer/fix-author 禁评审, 无 override); Fable5 (designer+breakdown_author) design-conflict ineligible; Codex(direction_synthesis) 为唯一非 implementer 决策模型, 无 code authorship conflict, 按 AGENTS.md strong-reviewer disclosure override 启用。fallback 路径 claude=Fable5 同样 design-conflict ineligible。详见 design_conflict_override.unrelated_reviewer_unavailable_evidence。

commit_state: Phase 5 review-2 ACCEPT + pre-accept gate PASS → stage_accepted_waiting_user。review-2: Codex (gpt5.5) final_reviewer ACCEPT, stage 级 base=fce1452/head=6c1e992 committed 指纹独立重算一致 (6c1e992…:a2140b…), next_action=stage_accepted_waiting_user。三项必查 Codex 独立判定: (1) Task A Kimi 隔离偏差存在但未实质推翻 ACCEPT, (2) bookkeeper dual_hat 披露充分, (3) Codex direction_synthesis 已披露按 strong-reviewer override 处理。reviewer_prior_involvement=direction_synthesis, fallback_reason + design_conflict_override 证据 (review-2-strong-reviewer-override-evidence.md) 已落档 per AGENTS.md (模型池无 unrelated decision model: claude_glm/kimi implementer hard-ban, Fable5 designer+breakdown conflict)。落档: review-2-round1.raw-output.md + 30-review-1.md + 50-review-2.md + override 证据 + 70-handoff 更新。补顶层 tests (status=passed) + review_1 (聚合, reviewer 字段省略避免 stage 级 identity 误碰撞) + review_2 (Codex + override 字段)。validate --phase pre-accept PASSED。status=stage_accepted_waiting_user (红线 can_accept_final=false, bookkeeper 不翻 accepted; merge main 仅限用户明确验收后)。Codex findings 3 P3: 70-handoff 过时(已本次修复)/evidence trailing whitespace(verbatim 不重写)/Kimi 隔离偏差 residual。residual_risks: ADR-9 E2b(OPEN R3)/ADR-8 fixture 行序/ADR-11 补录/E4 position_side 实测。
next_action: STAGE_ACCEPTED_WAITING_USER — awaiting user acceptance。review-2 ACCEPT 已落档, pre-accept gate PASSED, status 停在 stage_accepted_waiting_user。用户门: (1) 审 50-review-2.md + raw outputs + 交付物, (2) 验收通过后指示 merge stage/2026-07-private-account-v1 回 main (bookkeeper 不主动 merge, merge 策略用户定), (3) 验收后 follow-ups (ADR-11 补录 / ADR-9 E2b 实测 / E4 真实持仓复核, 均非阻塞)。红线: can_accept_final=false, bookkeeper 永不翻 accepted; stage_branch.merged_back_to_main=false。
